final_prompt.prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: editorial interior photography, lifestyle scene
Primary request: French romantic bedroom with four-poster bed, sheer canopy, vintage vanity, Paris street view through window
Scene/backdrop: elegant Parisian apartment bedroom, tall windows overlooking classic Paris street with Haussmann buildings
Subject: ornate four-poster bed with flowing sheer white canopy, antique wooden vanity with mirror, scattered rose petals on bed and floor
Style/medium: editorial interior photography, French romantic aesthetic
Composition/framing: wide establishing shot, natural perspective, window as secondary focal point
Lighting/mood: soft morning sunlight streaming through window, gentle and dreamy atmosphere, elegant yet lazy mood
Color palette: warm cream whites, soft blush pink from roses, muted gold accents, pale blue from morning light
Materials/textures: flowing sheer fabric, polished antique wood, crisp linen bedding, delicate rose petals, wrought iron bed frame
Constraints: maintain romantic French elegance, keep morning light quality, ensure Paris view visible through window
Avoid: harsh shadows, cluttered composition, modern furniture, plastic textures, oversaturated colors
